prompt: A timeless street scene of Paris at dusk, oil painted with soft, impressionistic strokes capturing the lively ambiance and glowing streetlights.
prompt_refined: A classic Parisian street scene at twilight, rendered as an oil painting with soft, impressionistic brushstrokes. The scene captures a lively, bustling ambiance, featuring indistinct figures strolling along the street. Warm light emanates from glowing, ornate streetlights, illuminating the foreground and casting a gentle glow on the surrounding historic Haussmann buildings. Emphasize visible, loose brushwork and shimmering light effects characteristic of Impressionism.
objects: Indistinct figures strolling along the street
